allow: PowerShell(if \($env:GEMINI_API_KEY\) { "key set, length=$\($env:GEMINI_API_KEY.Length\)" } else { "no GEMINI_API_KEY in env" })

PowerShell($word = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($word\) { "Word COM available - version $\($word.Version\)"; $word.Quit\(\) } else { "Word COM not available" })

PowerShell($src = 'C:\\Projects\\expense_app\\docs\\smart_expense_summary.html'; $dst = 'C:\\Projects\\expense_app\\docs\\Smart_Expense_Agent_Summary.docx'; $word = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application; $word.Visible = $false; $doc = $word.Documents.Open\($src\); $doc.SaveAs\([ref]$dst, [ref]16\); $doc.Close\(\); $word.Quit\(\); [System.Runtime.Interopservices.Marshal]::ReleaseComObject\($word\) | Out-Null; "Saved: $dst"; Get-Item $dst | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime)
PowerShell($flutter = Get-Command flutter -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($flutter\) { "flutter: $\($flutter.Source\)" } else { "flutter not on PATH" })
